archetype: 7 - Electric & Neon (Refined for Premium AI Health-Tech)
branding_tone: Futuristic, startup-grade, highly polished, clinical but tech-forward.

typography.guidelines: Do not use Inter for headings. Use fluid scaling. Apply tight letter spacing for headings.

colors.guidelines: Never use pure #000000. Use tinted deep space background. Elements should have a subtle 1px inner border. Interactive states must explicitly define hover text and background colors with high contrast.

spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Generous spacing: p-6 to p-12 for containers.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: The 'Control Room' grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.landing_grid: Mode A: The 'Tetris' grid. Highly asymmetrical. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12. Gap: gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.radii: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for pills/buttons.
spacing_and_layout.guidelines: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding. Use grid layouts strictly with direct children.

surfaces_and_effects.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05050A]/70 border-b border-white/10.
surfaces_and_effects.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#0C0C14) with 1px border-white/5. Hover adds -translate-y-1 and a subtle neon shadow (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(138,43,226,0.15)]).
surfaces_and_effects.webcam_container: Tracing Beam effect: neon border highlighting active AI facial mesh scanning.
surfaces_and_effects.glow: Use subtle drop-shadows on key text/metrics (drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)]).

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion: fade and slight upward slide.
motion_and_interactions.microinteractions: Hover scale 1.02 on interactive cards. Active state scale 0.98 on buttons.
motion_and_interactions.alerts: Pulsing animation for STRAIN DETECTED state.
motion_and_interactions.guidelines: Animations must respect prefers-reduced-motion. Transitions should be smooth (0.2s ease-out).

components.ui_library: Shadcn/UI heavily customized for dark futuristic theme.
components.charts: Shadcn Recharts components. Use gradient fills (Purple to Cyan) with dark grid lines (white/5).
components.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(138,43,226,0.5)].

hero_background.description: Abstract purple and white swirls creating an optical illusion, used as a subtle background behind the hero section with low opacity.

analytics_preview.description: Dashboard analytics glowing on screen, useful for landing page feature mockups.

user_avatar.description: Professional confident young man in dark suit, used for user profile/dashboard header.

tech_logo.description: Neon illuminated logo for sponsor or partner section in landing page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the landing page, SaaS dashboard, and real-time webcam UI in a unified React/Vite/Next stack as required.
The UI MUST reflect a premium, futuristic AI health-tech brand. Use the purple (#8A2BE2) and cyan (#00E5FF) colors heavily as accents over the deep dark background.
Implement the live webcam feed with a HUD overlay. Draw facial mesh or tracking boxes mimicking MediaPipe using HTML/Canvas/SVG over the video element. Apply cyan neon styling to the mesh.
Dashboard charts (daily/weekly/monthly fatigue analytics) MUST use Shadcn chart components with customized neon gradients.
Every interactive element (buttons, forms, links) MUST have a unique role-based `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='start-session-btn'`).
The UI should look like a high-end investor demo: use framer-motion for staggering list items, smooth card reveals, and glassmorphism on the sidebar/header.
DO NOT use Inter font for headings. Integrate Outfit (headings) and Manrope (body).
Include n8n webhook status and API health indicators in the Admin panel, styled as technical terminal/status pills.
